favorite.prompt: Tell me how the new bike compares to the old one.
favorite.answer: This bike feels noticeably lighter than the previous model.

bs.failure_reason: first staging batch had 7 per-item rejections (capital-letter chunks + missing explicit task in prompts); second batch failed set-level (embedded count below 3) before fix; both retried successfully, yielding 2 valid sets (sets 77 & 78)
